text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Tracen Academy is truly amazing, isn't it? 
Wherever you wish to go, you can get there 
quickly.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's not too big, so it's easy to remember 
your way around, too!♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I might actually be able to walk around
and see all the facilities here!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I tried that at home once, but it was so big 
I got lost. Maybe I'll try again here!♪
